search_query: Sleep and recovery strategies for athletes
source_articles_used: The effectiveness of dance interventions on sleep quality: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
Effectiveness of aerobic exercise in fibromyalgia: A systematic review and network meta-analysis.
The Role of Sleep on Physical and Cognitive Performance of Ultra-Endurance Athletes: A Systematic Review.
Circadian Rhythm and Sleep Disturbances in Young Adult Athletes: A Review About Risk Factors, Consequences, and Interventions.
Meta-analysis of the Effect of Yogic Techniques on Melatonin Levels: Implications for Sleep Health.

extracted_rules.condition: An individual experiences sleep disturbances or seeks to improve overall sleep quality.
extracted_rules.action: Incorporate dance interventions into their regular routine.

extracted_rules.rule_name: Aerobic Exercise for Enhanced Sleep Quality
extracted_rules.condition: An individual, particularly those with conditions like fibromyalgia, experiences sleep disturbances.

extracted_rules.rule_name: Pre-Competition Sleep Extension for Physical Performance
extracted_rules.condition: An ultra-endurance athlete is preparing for a competition.
extracted_rules.action: Extend sleep duration the night before the event.

extracted_rules.condition: An ultra-endurance athlete is experiencing cognitive fatigue during competition.

extracted_rules.rule_name: Importance of Pre-Race Sleep Quality for Cognition
extracted_rules.condition: An ultra-endurance athlete aims to optimize cognitive performance during competition.
extracted_rules.action: Prioritize and ensure high sleep quality in the period leading up to the race.

extracted_rules.rule_name: Sleep Duration for Athletic Performance and Mental Health
extracted_rules.condition: A young adult athlete seeks to enhance athletic performance and support mental health.
extracted_rules.formula_or_value: Could enhance athletic performance and support mental health

extracted_rules.rule_name: Consequences of Inadequate Sleep in Athletes
extracted_rules.action: Be aware that this can lead to reduced reaction times and mental health problems such as depressive symptoms and anxiety.
extracted_rules.formula_or_value: Reduced reaction times, mental health problems

extracted_rules.rule_name: Risk Factors for Sleep Disturbances in Athletes
extracted_rules.condition: An athlete's schedule includes early morning practice sessions, late night games, or travel across time zones (jet lag).
extracted_rules.action: Recognize these as significant risk factors for sleep and circadian rhythm disturbances and implement mitigating strategies.
extracted_rules.formula_or_value: Early morning practice sessions, late night games, jet lag

extracted_rules.rule_name: Yoga for Melatonin Enhancement and Sleep Quality
extracted_rules.condition: An individual seeks a non-pharmacological approach to enhance sleep health.
extracted_rules.action: Regularly practice yogic techniques, including meditation and mantra chanting.
extracted_rules.formula_or_value: Pooled SMD of 0.37 (95% - CI: [0.09; 0.66]) on melatonin levels
